description: Benign single-point validation fixtures for dynamic telemetry and static/dynamic comparison.

samples.name: Command execution fixture
samples.purpose: Generate a benign process_create telemetry event for cmd.exe.
safety_notes: Does not download or execute payloads.
Writes only a marker file under C:\Telemetry\fixtures.

samples.name: File write fixture
samples.purpose: Generate a benign file_create telemetry event under C:\Telemetry\fixtures.
safety_notes: Writes one marker file only.
No persistence and no network activity.

samples.name: Registry Run key fixture
samples.purpose: Generate a HKCU Run key registry_set telemetry event and support cleanup.
safety_notes: Uses HKCU only.
The value points to cmd.exe with a benign echo command.
Run cleanup after validation.

samples.name: Loopback network connection fixture
samples.purpose: Generate a network_connect attempt to 127.0.0.1 only.
safety_notes: Uses loopback only.
Does not connect to the internet.
Connection may fail if no listener exists; the attempt can still be useful telemetry.

samples.name: Scheduled task fixture
samples.purpose: Create, run, and remove a current-user scheduled task.
safety_notes: Current-user task only.
Runs cmd.exe with a benign echo command.
Run cleanup after validation.

samples.name: Controlled process access fixture
samples.purpose: Generate benign process-access telemetry against a short-lived child process.
expected_dynamic_fields: target process is the child cmd.exe or timeout.exe
safety_notes: Does not allocate memory in another process.
Does not write memory or create a remote thread.
Uses query-only process access for telemetry validation.

samples.name: Credential access query fixture
samples.purpose: Generate benign command-line evidence that references LSASS without dumping credentials.
safety_notes: Does not read LSASS memory.
Does not dump credentials.
Uses process query wording only to validate mapping and detection evidence.

samples.name: Anti-analysis probe fixture
samples.purpose: Generate benign telemetry and strings for debugger, sandbox, and virtualization checks.
expected_dynamic_fields: command_line or script content contains vmware
command_line or script content contains virtualbox
marker file contains anti-analysis probe terms
safety_notes: Reads local environment metadata only.
Does not disable tools or alter defensive controls.
Writes only a marker file under C:\Telemetry\fixtures.

samples.name: Anti-VM and sandbox evasion probe fixture
samples.purpose: Generate benign evidence for VM, sandbox, debugger, adapter, disk, timezone, and idle-time checks.
expected_dynamic_fields: command_line or marker content contains vmware or virtualbox
marker content contains PhysicalDrive, adapter, timezone, or idle-time probe terms
safety_notes: Read-only environment probing only.
Does not disable tools or change defensive controls.
Writes only a marker file under C:\Telemetry\fixtures.

samples.name: System discovery fixture
samples.purpose: Generate benign system information discovery evidence.
expected_dynamic_fields: command_line or marker content references system discovery terms
safety_notes: Read-only local discovery only.
Writes only a marker file under C:\Telemetry\fixtures.

samples.name: Privilege discovery fixture
samples.purpose: Generate benign privilege and permission discovery evidence.
expected_dynamic_fields: command_line or marker content references privilege discovery terms
safety_notes: Privilege checks are read-only.
Does not enable, request, or escalate privileges.

samples.name: File and directory discovery fixture
samples.purpose: Generate benign file and directory enumeration evidence.
expected_dynamic_fields: command_line or marker content references C:\Telemetry\fixtures enumeration
safety_notes: Enumerates lab fixture paths only.
Does not modify files outside marker cleanup.

samples.name: Trace setting modification fixture
samples.purpose: Generate controlled Microsoft Tracing registry modification evidence.
expected_dynamic_fields: value name contains EnableFileTracing, ConsoleTracingMask, or AutoFileTracing
samples.cleanup: Remove controlled Microsoft\Tracing test values created by the fixture
safety_notes: Use isolated VM snapshots for registry-write validation.
Does not modify defensive telemetry service settings.

samples.name: Static packer or obfuscation fixture
samples.purpose: Provide static-only encoded and high-entropy-looking artifacts for packer heuristic validation.
safety_notes: Static-focused fixture only.
Does not unpack or execute embedded code.
Writes marker artifacts under C:\Telemetry\fixtures.

samples.name: Service creation fixture
samples.purpose: Create, start, stop, and remove a benign Windows service for telemetry validation.
samples.cleanup: Stop and delete service SFPValidationService; remove C:\Telemetry\fixtures\service_creation_marker.txt
safety_notes: Creates a temporary benign service only.
Service command writes one marker file.
Run cleanup after validation.
